title: The Sandwich Picnic
synopsis: A simple picnic turns into a cheerful afternoon of food, grass, and games.
sentences: On Friday afternoon, June's family packed a basket for a picnic.
June helped make sandwiches with cheese, tomato, and cucumber.
Her brother filled a bottle with cold lemonade.
They walked to the park and found a place under a wide tree.
The grass was soft, and a light wind moved the leaves above them.
June was hungry by the time they spread the blanket.
The sandwiches tasted better outdoors than they had in the kitchen.
After eating, the children threw a small ball back and forth.
Their mother read quietly while their father lay back and watched the clouds.
A dog ran past and nearly stole one of the napkins.
Everyone laughed, and the dog ran back to its owner.
By the time they packed up, June already wanted another picnic.
